content: agent2: implementing global filter registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will edit that file - let me know if you're touching it too.

agent2: I've already added GLOBAL_FILTER_REGISTRY dict + register_filter()/unregister_filter() functions right after the imports (before the Prompt class) in outlines/prompts.py. I also added one line 'env.filters.update(GLOBAL_FILTER_REGISTRY)' inside _template_from_str (right after env = jinja2.Environment(...), before env.filters['name']=... etc) and the same line inside _template_from_file (right after env = jinja2.Environment(...), before return env.get_template(...)). That's my only change to those two methods - I did NOT touch the prompt() decorator or method signatures. Feel free to build create_jinja_env() around this: apply GLOBAL_FILTER_REGISTRY first, then built-ins, then your per-call 'filters' param last so local per-call filters win. Go ahead and refactor _template_from_str/_template_from_file into create_jinja_env - just keep the GLOBAL_FILTER_REGISTRY.update(...) call in there so global registration still works. Ping me if you want me to adjust anything on my end.
